title: Braised Brazilian Beef
description: A hearty beef stew inspired by Brazilian cuisine, with a tangy twist.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Brown the beef on all sides, then remove and set aside.
Add the onion and garlic to the pot and cook until softened.
Add the beef back to the pot, along with the barbecue sauce, seasonings, and coffee (if using).
Bring the mixture to a boil, then cover and transfer to the oven.
Braise the beef for 2-3 hours, or until tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (if desired).
